findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: The cityscape photograph at the bottom of PDF page 1 (showing a city skyline at dusk with mountains) is missing from the HTML. Only the top lighthouse banner image from the cover slide is included.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 contains two distinct landscape photographs: a coastal lighthouse scene at top and a city skyline at dusk at the bottom. The HTML has only one tag for the cover section, with alt text referencing only the lighthouse landscape.
